narrative:
Blue Creek Twp (precinct in Paulding County) has 400 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.0 percentage points.
